summary: Astrolabe is misconfigured
description:
See https://evergreen.mongodb.com/build/drivers_atlas_testing_tests_dotnet_windows__driver~dotnet_master_platform~windows_64_runtime~dotnet_sync_netcoreapp2.1_6169c8a83627e06482dd1c92_21_10_15_18_30_00

Logs: https://evergreen.mongodb.com/task_log_raw/drivers_atlas_testing_tests_dotnet_windows__driver~dotnet_master_platform~windows_64_runtime~dotnet_sync_netcoreapp2.1_retryReads_move_6169c8a83627e06482dd1c92_21_10_15_18_30_00/0?type=T#L737

Something in https://github.com/mongodb-labs/drivers-atlas-testing/tree/master/integrations/dotnet may no longer be correct due to an unrelated change in the driver.

summary: Test that KMS TLS connections verify peer certificates
Add [InternalsVisibleTo("MongoDB.Driver")] to Core
description: Rather than continuing to expose internal implementation details from Core when we need to use them from both Driver and Core, we will allow Driver to see internal methods and classes in Core. This involves some cleanup of the Shared directory to resolve naming conflicts.

summary: Research the failed reasons for Should_call_custom_server_selector test
description: This is the follow-up investigation after the CSHARP-2964. The details are described here: [HELP-17283|https://jira.mongodb.org/projects/HELP/queues/issue/HELP-17283]

summary: Support AggregateFluent.Group with expressions using LINQ3
description: AggregateFluent.Group with Expressions is still using LINQ2.

summary: Support $$ROOT in LINQ for agg
description:
The expected behavior of GroupBy method on LINQ is to return a IGrouping<TKey,TDocument>, where TKey is the group key type and TDocument is a IEnumerable<TDocument>. In this case it returns an empty IEnumerable.

Is this the expected behavior? Becasue this in not the expected in other LINQ implementations.

summary: Fix OCSP test failures on Evergreen
Add support for FLE_MONGOCRYPTD_PORT environment variable
description:
Currently tests require mongocryptd to be on port 27020.

But that conflicts with sharded clusters started up using mlaunch, which also use port 27020 for all but the simplest clusters.

Add support for an optional FLE_MONGOCRYPTD_PORT environment variable to override the port which will be used for mongocryptd.

A good value for the new FLE_MONGOCRYPTD_PORT environment variable could be 27030.

summary: Support BsonDocument and BsonArray in LINQ queries.
Expressions for datetime truncation and binning
description:
{panel:title=Downstream Change Summary|titleBGColor=#239eb0|bgColor=#c2d2c2}
    Specific downstream impact TBD.
    {panel}

    h2. Description of Linked Ticket
    {panel:title=Epic Summary|borderStyle=dashed|borderColor=#ccc|titleBGColor=#239eb0|bgColor=#c2d2c2}

h4. Summary
Add expressions for datetime manipulation that do not involve time durations.

h4. Motivation
This feature is necessary for us to release an MVP for a Time Series product.

h4. Cast of Characters
* Product Owner: Katya Kamenieva
* Project Lead: TBD
* Program Manager: Craig Homa
* Drivers Contact: TBD


h4. Documentation
[Scope Document|http://tinyurl.com/yahpv2qh]
[Technical Design Document|http://tinyurl.com/y8qls78u]
[Product Description|http://tinyurl.com/y9dqp6qn]

{panel}

summary: MongoConnectionPoolPausedException should be resumable for change stream
description:
From a recent test, this stack trace has been observed:

{noformat}
Unhandled exception. MongoDB.Driver.MongoConnectionPoolPausedException: The connection pool is in paused state for server autodispo1-shard-00-01-pri.fmh6e.mongodb.net:27016.
 at MongoDB.Driver.Core.ConnectionPools.ExclusiveConnectionPool.PoolState.ThrowIfNotReady()
 at MongoDB.Driver.Core.ConnectionPools.ExclusiveConnectionPool.AcquireConnectionHelper.StartCheckingOut()
 at MongoDB.Driver.Core.ConnectionPools.ExclusiveConnectionPool.AcquireConnectionHelper.AcquireConnection(CancellationToken cancellationToken)
 at MongoDB.Driver.Core.ConnectionPools.ExclusiveConnectionPool.AcquireConnection(CancellationToken cancellationToken)
 at MongoDB.Driver.Core.Servers.Server.GetChannel(CancellationToken cancellationToken)
 at MongoDB.Driver.Core.Bindings.ServerChannelSource.GetChannel(CancellationToken cancellationToken)
 at MongoDB.Driver.Core.Bindings.ChannelSourceHandle.GetChannel(CancellationToken cancellationToken)
 at MongoDB.Driver.Core.Operations.AsyncCursor`1.GetNextBatch(CancellationToken cancellationToken)
 at MongoDB.Driver.Core.Operations.AsyncCursor`1.MoveNext(CancellationToken cancellationToken)
 at MongoDB.Driver.Core.Operations.ChangeStreamCursor`1.MoveNext(CancellationToken cancellationToken)
 at MongoDB.Driver.Core.Operations.AsyncCursorEnumerator`1.MoveNext()
 at MongoTest.Program.Main(String[] args) in /RiderProjects/MongoTest/MongoTest/Program.cs:line 148
{noformat}

This exception should be resumable in addition to being retryable.

Note that in scope of JAVA-4289 we decided to make all {{MongoClientException}} resumable.  We should consider the same for C#.

summary: Add a load balancer test case for SRV resolving to 0 hosts
description: This ticket was split from DRIVERS-1835, please see that ticket for a detailed description.

summary: Protect xunit/logging infrastructure by DebuggerStepThrough
description:
In the current test implementation we can accidentally visit xunit/logging infrastructure in debugging, it's better to hide this logic via [DebuggerStepThrough] attribute.

We can also consider adding `Debugger.IsAttached` condition [https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.diagnostics.debugger.isattached?view=net-5.0] to avoid throwing timeout exception in debugging

summary: BulkDeleteOperation ignores isOrdered parameter
description:
BulkMixedWriteOperation.CreateBulkDeleteOperation should set 
 IsOrdered = _isOrdered.

summary: Fix X509CertificateCollectionEqualityComparer comparing logic
Remove AsQueryable3
description:
The AsQueryable3 method is an older way to select using LINQ3. It should be removed.

The current way is to configure the LinqProvider in the MongoClientSettings.

summary: Remove WithOptions and WithSessions
description:
Remove the `WithOptions` and `WithSessions` extension methods. They are currently `internal` and therefore aren't even visible to an application.

It's possible we may re-introduce these in the future as part of the public API. The question is whether the options and settings even need to be replaced with different values than were originally provided in the call to `AsQueryable`.

summary: Move the string extension methods in MongoDBLinqExtensions to StringExtensions
description: Some String extension methods in MongoDBLinqExtensions are currently internal but were meant to be public. The should also be in a more reasonably named class: StringExtensions.

summary: PipelineStageDefinitionBuilder.GroupForLinq3 returns tuple which breaks documentation generation
description:
Sandcastle cannot handle methods that return tuples. Building documentation for {{PipelineStageDefinitionBuilder.GroupForLinq3}} resulted in numerous errors and generated incorrect documentation. This included wrong parameter types, unspecified return type, and numerous red warnings about missing documentation in the generated HTML.

Refactor this method to return an explicit type with properties rather than using a tuple return value.

summary: GroupJoin with projection yields incorrect query
Get all tests to pass against a cluster with a single mongos and default configurations
description:
There are a number of tests (47 at the time this ticket is being created) that fail when run against a cluster with a single mongos.

To reproduce start a cluster with mlaunch like this:
{code:java}mlaunch init --sharded 1 --replicaset --nodes 1 --mongos 1 --binarypath C:\mongodb\v5.0.3\bin --setParameter enableTestCommands=true{code}
which results in the following cluster configuration:
{code:java}PS C:\mlaunch\v5.0.3\sharded> mlaunch list

PROCESS          PORT     STATUS     PID

mongos           27017    running    27192

config server    27019    running    29380

shard01
    mongod       27018    running    10192


PS C:\mlaunch\v5.0.3\sharded>{code}
 Then run the tests using:
{code:java}
.\build.ps1 --target=testnet472 // or test {code}
The tests should be run using the default connection strings built into the test suite. In other words, the `MONGODB_URI` and `MONGODB_URI_WITH_MULTIPLE_MONGOSES` environment variables should not be set.

summary: High Memory Usage on InsertMany and InsertManyAsync
description:
I have a basic .NET 6 Application which generates GUID and insert into MongoDB which is running on my local Docker container.

The problem I am having is memory usage of C# application is increasing enormously. 

Here is the insert logic:

!image-2021-11-27-23-19-21-371.png!

I have reviewed memory usage on Visual Studio 2022 Community edition. 

Here is the memory usage and CancellationTokenSource+CallbackNode is equals to the number of documents inserted to mongodb.

!image-2021-11-27-23-16-55-836.png!

summary: Support LinqExtensions.Inject in LINQ3
Fix cleanup-test-resources on Linux and Macos
description: In the scope of KMIP changes, cleanup-test-resources.sh was broken on Linux and MacOS [envs|https://evergreen.mongodb.com/task_log_raw/dot_net_driver_secure_tests_linux__version~4.2_os~ubuntu_1804_topology~sharded_cluster_auth~auth_ssl~ssl_test_netstandard20_patch_8da3db7a32907e400d22392b0c7a0f9a9c1c0572_61b280d3306615750a497fe5_21_12_09_22_18_59/0?type=T#L35032]. We should fix it

summary: Update estimatedDocumentCount test for Atlas Data Lake
description: This ticket was split from DRIVERS-1991, please see that ticket for a detailed description.

summary: Deserialize Select of anonymous types using default values for missing fields
Use `throw;` instead of `throw ex;` when re-throwing an unwrapped exception in BinaryConnection
Ignore read preference for $out/$merge on secondaries if any servers are pre-5.0
description: This ticket was split from DRIVERS-1969, please see that ticket for a detailed description.

summary: [Unconfigurable] connection rate limiter in 2.13.x breaks existing applications
description:
Hello!

The resolution for the CSHARP-3305 issue introduced the limit on simultaneous connection attempts. Unfortunately, this breaks some existing applications when upgrading to 2.13.x, if they operate under considerable load with high concurrency, especially when using co-hosted {{mongos}} instance.
I surely understand that you would like to prevent overloading the server with a lot of connections. We even implemented similar measures by introducing a delay in {{IEventSubscriber.ConnectionPoolAddingConnectionEvent}} handler. Unfortunately, the apparent lack of ability to disable it or configure the {{MongoInternalDefaults.ConnectionPool.MaxConnecting}} blocks the upgrade to 2.13.x for us quite possibly may affect other users.

I would like to ask you to expose the {{MaxConnecting}} parameter so driver users can tune it to their liking and disable it.

Thank you,
Aristarkh Zagorodnikov

summary: Support authorizedCollections option for listCollections helpers
description: This ticket was split from DRIVERS-1393, please see that ticket for a detailed description.

summary: Switch to using maxWireVersion rather than buildInfo to determine feature support
description: The .NET/C# Driver calls {{buildInfo}} to determine the connected server's semantic version and then uses that information in {{src/MongoDB.Driver.Core/Core/Misc/Feature.cs}} to determine whether a feature is supported. The Java Driver used to do this too but switched to {{maxWireVersion}} from {{isMaster}}/{{hello}} to determine feature support in the 4.0 release of the Java driver. We should consider this change for the 3.0 of the .NET/C# driver as C# is now the only driver that calls {{buildInfo}} and uses it in this way.

summary: Remove reliance on "$explain" modifier so FindOpcodeOperation can be removed
Require hello command for connection handshake to use OP_MSG, disallowing OP_QUERY
description: This ticket was split from DRIVERS-1916, please see that ticket for a detailed description.

summary: Consider allowing to implement the GridFSUploadStream[<>] and GridFSDownloadStream[<>]
description: Currently, the IGridFSBucket[<>] interfaces expose methods that return instances of the GridFSUploadStream[<>] and GridFSDownloadStream[<>] abstract classes. Unfortunately, their constructors are internal, so decoration of IGridFSBucket[<>] that requires decoration of returned streams is impossible, because one cannot inherit from a class with an internal constructor. This is disappointing, especially given that other interfaces (collection, database, client, etc.) are very much decoratable and look carefully desigined. While I understand that there might be compelling reasons for this, that are unknown to me, I ask you to consider removing the internal constructor to allow inheritance and, hence, decoration of the GridFS-related interfaces, especially since this does not look like a breaking change.

summary: Add expression to get value by keyname from object
SRV and TXT DNS Failures - Duplicated DNS Response Breaks Subsequent DNS Response Read
description:
h4. Summary 
This issue only affects SRV and TXT lookups (mongodb+srv:// connection strings) in environments where DNS servers are incorrectly(?) sending duplicate DNS responses for a single DNS request (Azure AKS in this reproduction).

As a result, SRV lookups will "fail" in the driver, leading to a server selection timeout with an empty Servers [] list.

h4. Please provide the version of the driver. If applicable, please provide the MongoDB server version and topology (standalone, replica set, or sharded cluster).

MongoDB.Bson: 2.14.1
MongoDB.Driver: 2.14.1
MongoDB.Driver.Core: 2.14.1
DnsClient: 1.4.0 (also tested 1.5.0)

MongoDB Atlas 4.4.10 - M2 Replica Set

h4. How to Reproduce
Deploy a C# dotnet application to an environment with a propensity for sending repeated/duplicated DNS responses to a single query.  In this reproduction, we used Azure's AKS w/ CoreDNS (default) and k8s 1.21.
Container tests were built from both Ubuntu 18.04 and Ubuntu 20.04 with .NET 5.0.
Connect to the MongoDB deployment using mongodb+srv connection string.  Repeat the connection attempts until DNS retransmissions are witnessed in a tcpdump.  Expectation is a failure in SRV and/or TXT and followed by a server selection timeout.

h4. Additional Background
The DnsClient response appears to be holding the second copy of the first request in queue.  In this case, we are asking for TXT first followed by SRV, but the order of requests shouldn't matter as:
When the response for SRV is requested, the TXT (second response) is returned instead, leading to a DNS header mismatch warning in the DnsClient verbose logs.  When not testing DnsClient, it surfaces as a server selection timeout and no other details are logged by the MongoDB driver.

I've linked CSHARP-3430 where I believe the root issue was not resolved.  The exception was replaced with a warning, but the SRV to hosts list continues to fail.

It's important to note that A and AAAA lookups in a similar environment do not cause issues.  As a workaround, you may use the mongodb:// connection string to avoid SRV and TXT lookups.

summary: Query MongoDb sublists with C# LINQ regex
Performance: Too many lambda closure allocations in JsonWriter.EscapedString
description:
Some lambda closure related allocation topic has popped up in my most recent perf. profiling:

!image-2022-01-31-22-52-21-374.png!

!image-2022-01-31-22-51-48-450.png!

!image-2022-01-31-22-55-01-398.png!

The fix for this appears to be a complete no-brainer: Make the NeedsEscaping method static. I will create a PR for this. There's additional algorithmic improvement opportunities here but I am not sure they're worth looking into at this stage. Will keep on profiling. ;)

summary: Object must implement IConvertible
LINQ join throws exception on the whole document projection
Quering for first item of GroupBy aggregation produces NotSupportedException
Comparisons in a LINQ Select projection should use the field serializer to serialize constants
Filters in subdocuments can't use fields from the parent document
StackOverflow when expression contains IQueryable
UpdateDefinitionBuilder generates incorrect Bson when using $set and multiple array subdocs
UpdateDefinitionBuilder fails when updating enumerable field type with "object"
Increase .NET testing coverage
description:
We currently test on .NET Framework 4.5.2 and .NET Core 2.1 (previously .NET FW 4.5 and .NET Core 1.0). We have received HELP tickets inquiring as to our support for later .NET versions. Our drivers should theoretically work with later .NET implementations, but without testing, this is merely an informed guess, and we have received HELP tickets that would imply that this guess may be incorrect.

We should test other .NET implementations (e.g. .NET Framework 4.7.2, .NET Core 1.0) so that we can be sure that the driver works as intended on all .NET implementations (e.g. NET FW >=4.5 and the most common implementations of .NET Standard >=1.5 i.e. .NET Core >=1.0).

summary: Support SASLPrep on .NET Standard
description:
[RFC-4013 SASLPrep|https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc4013.txt] is a prerequisite for implementation of SCRAM-SHA-256. We currently only fully support SASLPrep on  the .NET Framework version of the driver. 

Relevant snippet from the ApiDocs:
{quote}In .NET Standard, authenticating via SCRAM-SHA-256 may not work with non-ASCII passwords because SaslPrep is not fully implemented due to the lack of a string normalization function in .NET Standard 1.5. Normalizing the password into Unicode Normalization Form KC beforehand MAY help. SCRAM-SHA-1 is the recommended alternative for now.
{quote}
